meta.phase-name: Pack/Report Binding and Canonical Model Selection

phase-plan.purpose: Tie Space Explorer report analysis to concrete content-pack builds and keep model selection canonical-first.
phase-plan.scope: Add loaded pack/report identity status in Space Explorer with hash mismatch warnings, bind browser-generated reports to loaded pack identity, restrict stat-model selectors to canonical model instances by default, and emit play-report binding artifacts in GitHub workflows.

file.description: Pack/report identity capture, mismatch status UI, canonical-first model options, and report binding propagation.
Generate and upload `play-report-binding` artifact tied to content-pack report hash.
Generate release `play-report-binding` artifact tied to release content-pack report hash.
